mapper.select: SELECT -- TM: 집계 대상 팀 T.TM_ID, -- 승: 홈팀이고 홈 점수가 높거나, 원정팀이고 원정 점수가 높은 경우 SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_TM_ID = T.TM_ID AND G.HOME_SCORE > G.AWAY_SCORE THEN 1 WHEN G.AWAY_TM_ID = T.TM_ID AND G.AWAY_SCORE > G.HOME_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS W, -- 패: 반대 SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_TM_ID = T.TM_ID AND G.HOME_SCORE < G.AWAY_SCORE THEN 1 WHEN G.AWAY_TM_ID = T.TM_ID AND G.AWAY_SCORE < G.HOME_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS L, -- 무: 동점 SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_SCORE = G.AWAY_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS T, -- RS: 득점 SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_TM_ID = T.TM_ID THEN COALESCE(G.HOME_SCORE, 0) WHEN G.AWAY_TM_ID = T.TM_ID THEN COALESCE(G.AWAY_SCORE, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS RS, -- RA: 실점 SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_TM_ID = T.TM_ID THEN COALESCE(G.AWAY_SCORE, 0) WHEN G.AWAY_TM_ID = T.TM_ID THEN COALESCE(G.HOME_SCORE, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS RA, COUNT(G.GAME_ID) AS G_CNT FROM TM T JOIN GAME G ON (G.HOME_TM_ID = T.TM_ID OR G.AWAY_TM_ID = T.TM_ID) AND G.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND MONTH(G.GAME_DT) = #{mon} AND G.GAME_STTS_CD = '02' -- 완료 경기만 GROUP BY T.TM_ID
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TM_MON_REC (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, MON, W, L, T, RS, RA) VALUES
(#{r.tmId}, #{r.ssntYr}, #{r.mon}, #{r.w}, #{r.l}, #{r.t}, #{r.rs}, #{r.ra})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE W = VALUES(W), L = VALUES(L), T = VALUES(T), RS = VALUES(RS), RA = VALUES(RA)
mapper.select: SELECT -- PLR_BATR_GAME_REC: 타자 경기 기록 B.PLR_ID, B.TM_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT B.GAME_ID) AS G, SUM(B.PA) AS PA, SUM(B.AB) AS AB, SUM(B.H) AS H, SUM(B.DOBL) AS DOBL, SUM(B.TRPL) AS TRPL, SUM(B.HR) AS HR, SUM(B.RBI) AS RBI, SUM(B.R) AS R, SUM(B.BB) AS BB, SUM(B.IBB) AS IBB, SUM(B.SO) AS SO, SUM(B.SB) AS SB, SUM(B.CS) AS CS, SUM(B.HBP) AS HBP, SUM(B.SAC) AS SAC, SUM(B.SF) AS SF, SUM(B.GIDP) AS GIDP, -- 타율 = H / AB CASE WHEN SUM(B.AB) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(B.H) / SUM(B.AB), 3) ELSE NULL END AS BA, -- 출루율 = (H+BB+HBP) / (AB+BB+HBP+SF) CASE WHEN (SUM(B.AB) + SUM(B.BB) + SUM(B.HBP) + SUM(B.SF)) > 0 THEN ROUND( (SUM(B.H) + SUM(B.BB) + SUM(B.HBP)) / (SUM(B.AB) + SUM(B.BB) + SUM(B.HBP) + SUM(B.SF)), 3) ELSE NULL END AS OBP, -- 장타율 = TB / AB CASE WHEN SUM(B.AB) > 0 THEN ROUND( (SUM(B.H) + SUM(B.DOBL) + SUM(B.TRPL)*2 + SUM(B.HR)*3) / SUM(B.AB), 3) ELSE NULL END AS SLG FROM PLR_BATR_GAME_REC B JOIN GAME G ON G.GAME_ID = B.GAME_ID AND G.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND MONTH(G.GAME_DT) = #{mon} AND G.GAME_STTS_CD = '02' GROUP BY B.PLR_ID, B.TM_ID

SELECT -- PLR_PTCH_GAME_REC: 투수 경기 기록 P.PLR_ID, P.TM_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT P.GAME_ID) AS G, SUM(CASE WHEN P.IP_OUT >= 18 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GS, -- 선발 기준: 6이닝 이상 SUM(P.IP_OUT) AS IP_OUT, SUM(P.BF) AS BF, SUM(P.H) AS H, SUM(P.HR) AS HR, SUM(P.R) AS R, SUM(P.ER) AS ER, SUM(P.BB) AS BB, SUM(P.IBB) AS IBB, SUM(P.SO) AS SO, SUM(P.HBP) AS HBP, SUM(P.W) AS W, SUM(P.L) AS L, SUM(P.SV) AS SV, SUM(P.HLD) AS HLD, -- ERA = ER * 27 / IP_OUT CASE WHEN SUM(P.IP_OUT) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(P.ER) * 27.0 / SUM(P.IP_OUT), 2) ELSE NULL END AS ERA, -- WHIP = (BB + H) / (IP_OUT / 3) CASE WHEN SUM(P.IP_OUT) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(P.BB) + SUM(P.H)) * 3.0 / SUM(P.IP_OUT), 3) ELSE NULL END AS WHIP FROM PLR_PTCH_GAME_REC P JOIN GAME G ON G.GAME_ID = P.GAME_ID AND G.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND MONTH(G.GAME_DT) = #{mon} AND G.GAME_STTS_CD = '02' GROUP BY P.PLR_ID, P.TM_ID
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO PLR_BATR_MON_REC (PLR_ID, SSNT_YR, MON, TM_ID, G, PA, AB, H, DOBL, TRPL, HR, RBI, R, BB, IBB, SO, SB, CS, HBP, SAC, SF, GIDP, BA, OBP, SLG, OPS) VALUES
(#{r.plrId}, #{r.ssntYr}, #{r.mon}, #{r.tmId}, #{r.g}, #{r.pa}, #{r.ab}, #{r.h}, #{r.dobl}, #{r.trpl}, #{r.hr}, #{r.rbi}, #{r.r}, #{r.bb}, #{r.ibb}, #{r.so}, #{r.sb}, #{r.cs}, #{r.hbp}, #{r.sac}, #{r.sf}, #{r.gidp}, #{r.ba}, #{r.obp}, #{r.slg}, CASE WHEN #{r.obp} IS NOT NULL AND #{r.slg} IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(#{r.obp} + #{r.slg}, 3) ELSE NULL END)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE G=VALUES(G), PA=VALUES(PA), AB=VALUES(AB), H=VALUES(H), DOBL=VALUES(DOBL), TRPL=VALUES(TRPL), HR=VALUES(HR), RBI=VALUES(RBI), R=VALUES(R), BB=VALUES(BB), SO=VALUES(SO), SB=VALUES(SB), HBP=VALUES(HBP), BA=VALUES(BA), OBP=VALUES(OBP), SLG=VALUES(SLG), OPS=VALUES(OPS)

INSERT INTO PLR_PTCH_MON_REC (PLR_ID, SSNT_YR, MON, TM_ID, G, GS, IP_OUT, BF, H, HR, R, ER, BB, IBB, SO, HBP, W, L, SV, HLD, ERA, WHIP) VALUES
(#{r.plrId}, #{r.ssntYr}, #{r.mon}, #{r.tmId}, #{r.g}, #{r.gs}, #{r.ipOut}, #{r.bf}, #{r.h}, #{r.hr}, #{r.r}, #{r.er}, #{r.bb}, #{r.ibb}, #{r.so}, #{r.hbp}, #{r.w}, #{r.l}, #{r.sv}, #{r.hld}, #{r.era}, #{r.whip})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE G=VALUES(G), GS=VALUES(GS), IP_OUT=VALUES(IP_OUT), H=VALUES(H), HR=VALUES(HR), R=VALUES(R), ER=VALUES(ER), BB=VALUES(BB), SO=VALUES(SO), W=VALUES(W), L=VALUES(L), SV=VALUES(SV), HLD=VALUES(HLD), ERA=VALUES(ERA), WHIP=VALUES(WHIP)
mapper.select: SELECT B.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM, B.PA, B.BA, B.OPS, B.HR, B.RBI FROM PLR_BATR_MON_REC B JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = B.PLR_ID JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = B.TM_ID WHERE B.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND B.MON = #{mon} AND B.PA >= 40 AND B.OPS IS NOT NULL ORDER BY B.OPS DESC, B.HR DESC, B.RBI DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT P2.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM, P2.IP_OUT, P2.ERA, P2.W, P2.SO FROM PLR_PTCH_MON_REC P2 JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = P2.PLR_ID JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = P2.TM_ID WHERE P2.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND P2.MON = #{mon} AND P2.IP_OUT >= 45 AND P2.ERA IS NOT NULL ORDER BY P2.ERA ASC, P2.W DESC, P2.SO DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT TM.TM_ID, TM.TM_KR_NM, COALESCE(MKT.AVG_ATND_CNT, 5000) AS AVG_ATND_CNT, -- 기본 평균 관중 COALESCE(MKT.PPLT_RTG, 50) AS PPLT_RTG -- 팀 인기 FROM TM TM LEFT JOIN TM_MKT_SSNT MKT ON MKT.TM_ID = TM.TM_ID AND MKT.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}
SELECT P.TM_ID, SUM(COALESCE(P.PLR_ANSL_SAL, 0)) AS TOTAL_SAL FROM PLR P WHERE P.TM_ID IS NOT NULL AND P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'AT' GROUP BY P.TM_ID
SELECT HOME_TM_ID AS TM_ID, COUNT(*) AS HOME_GAME_CNT FROM GAME WHERE SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND MONTH(GAME_DT) = #{mon} AND GAME_STTS_CD = '02' GROUP BY HOME_TM_ID
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TM_FNC_SSNT (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, TCKT_REV, PLR_SAL_COST) VALUES
(#{r.tmId}, #{r.ssntYr}, #{r.tcktRev}, #{r.plrSalCost})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE TCKT_REV = TCKT_REV + VALUES(TCKT_REV), PLR_SAL_COST = PLR_SAL_COST + VALUES(PLR_SAL_COST), CUR_CASH = COALESCE(CUR_CASH, 0) + VALUES(TCKT_REV) - VALUES(PLR_SAL_COST)
mapper.select: SELECT TM_ID, W, L, T, -- 승률: 무승부 0.5승 처리 CASE WHEN (W + L) > 0 THEN ROUND((W + T * 0.5) / (W + L + T), 4) ELSE 0.5 END AS WIN_PCT FROM TM_MON_REC WHERE SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND MON = #{mon}
SELECT TM_ID, COALESCE(FAN_STSFCTN, 50) AS FAN_STSFCTN, COALESCE(OWN_STSFCTN, 50) AS OWN_STSFCTN, COALESCE(FAN_LYLTY, 50) AS FAN_LYLTY FROM TM_MKT_SSNT WHERE SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TM_MKT_SSNT (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, FAN_STSFCTN, OWN_STSFCTN) VALUES
(#{r.tmId}, #{r.ssntYr}, #{r.fanStsfctn}, #{r.ownStsfctn})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FAN_STSFCTN = VALUES(FAN_STSFCTN), OWN_STSFCTN = VALUES(OWN_STSFCTN)
mapper.select: SELECT BS.WIN_BONUS FROM GAME_CFG GC JOIN BRDCST_SPNSR BS ON BS.BRDCST_CD = GC.CFG_VAL WHERE GC.CFG_KEY = 'BRDCST_SPNSR' LIMIT 1
SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = 'USER_TM_ID' LIMIT 1

SELECT TMR.W, TMR.L, TMR.T, TMR.RS, TMR.RA, T.TM_KR_NM, -- 시즌 누적 S.W AS SEASON_W, S.L AS SEASON_L, S.STND_RNK FROM TM_MON_REC TMR JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = TMR.TM_ID LEFT JOIN STND S ON S.TM_ID = TMR.TM_ID AND S.SSNT_YR = TMR.SSNT_YR WHERE TMR.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND TMR.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND TMR.MON = #{mon} LIMIT 1

SELECT P.PLR_NM, B.PA, B.BA, B.OPS, B.HR, B.RBI FROM PLR_BATR_MON_REC B JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = B.PLR_ID WHERE B.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND B.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND B.MON = #{mon} AND B.PA >= 15 AND B.OPS IS NOT NULL ORDER BY B.OPS DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT P.PLR_NM, P2.IP_OUT, P2.ERA, P2.W, P2.SV, P2.SO FROM PLR_PTCH_MON_REC P2 JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = P2.PLR_ID WHERE P2.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND P2.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND P2.MON = #{mon} AND P2.IP_OUT >= 9 AND P2.ERA IS NOT NULL ORDER BY P2.ERA ASC, P2.W DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(TCKT_REV, 0) AS TCKT_REV, COALESCE(BCST_REV, 0) AS BCST_REV, COALESCE(PLR_SAL_COST, 0) AS PLR_SAL_COST, COALESCE(CUR_CASH, 0) AS CUR_CASH FROM TM_FNC_SSNT WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId} AND SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SSNT_EVNT (SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, TM_ID, EVNT_TYPE_CD, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS) VALUES
(#{e.ssntYr}, #{e.evntDt}, #{e.tmId}, #{e.evntTypeCd}, #{e.evntTtlt}, #{e.evntCnts})
mapper.select: SELECT TM_ID, W, L, T, CASE WHEN (W + L) > 0 THEN ROUND(W / (W + L), 4) ELSE 0 END AS PCT FROM STND WHERE SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} ORDER BY PCT DESC, W DESC
